# NeMo Curator

> NVIDIA NeMo Curator is an open-source, GPU-accelerated data preprocessing and curation toolkit for preparing high-quality training datasets for large language models (LLMs) and multimodal AI. It runs on NVIDIA RAPIDS (cuDF, cuML, cuGraph) and Ray, scaling from a single workstation to multi-node, multi-GPU clusters. Supports Text, Image, Video, and Audio modalities through a composable Python API. License: Apache-2.0.

**Install:** `uv pip install "nemo-curator[text_cuda12]"`
**Python:** 3.10 – 3.12 · **CUDA:** 12.x for GPU path · **CPU-only:** `nemo-curator[text_cpu]`
**PyPI:** https://pypi.org/project/nemo-curator/
**GitHub:** https://github.com/NVIDIA-NeMo/Curator

## Documentation

- [Full Documentation](https://docs.nvidia.com/nemo/curator/latest/): complete reference for all pipeline stages, API, and configuration
- [Installation Guide](https://docs.nvidia.com/nemo/curator/latest/admin/installation.html): system requirements, install commands, CUDA matrix, Docker
- [Text Curation](https://docs.nvidia.com/nemo/curator/latest/get-started/text.html): web scraping, HTML extraction, quality filtering, deduplication, PII redaction, language ID
- [Image Curation](https://docs.nvidia.com/nemo/curator/latest/get-started/image.html): CLIP embeddings, aesthetic scoring, NSFW filtering for VLM training data
- [Video Curation](https://docs.nvidia.com/nemo/curator/latest/get-started/video.html): scene detection, clip splitting, Cosmos embedding, distributed pipeline
- [Audio Curation](https://docs.nvidia.com/nemo/curator/latest/get-started/audio.html): ASR inference, WER/CER quality scoring, speech metrics
- [API Reference](https://docs.nvidia.com/nemo/curator/latest/apidocs/index.html): full Python API documentation
- [Concepts](https://docs.nvidia.com/nemo/curator/latest/about/concepts/index.html): pipeline architecture, deduplication theory, scaling guide
- [Release Notes](https://docs.nvidia.com/nemo/curator/latest/about/release-notes/): version history and changelog

## Source

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/NVIDIA-NeMo/Curator): source code, issues, pull requests
- [Tutorials](https://github.com/NVIDIA-NeMo/Curator/tree/main/tutorials): runnable examples for text, image, video, and audio
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/NVIDIA-NeMo/Curator/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): contribution guidelines for this repository
- [Releases](https://github.com/NVIDIA-NeMo/Curator/releases): version history with release notes

## Key Facts

- [Performance Benchmarks](https://github.com/NVIDIA-NeMo/Curator#why-nemo-curator): 16× faster fuzzy dedup, 40% lower TCO, near-linear GPU scaling tables
- [FAQ](https://github.com/NVIDIA-NeMo/Curator#frequently-asked-questions): 13 Q&A pairs covering GPU requirements, Python support, deduplication types, PII, scaling, custom filters
- [Comparison Table](https://github.com/NVIDIA-NeMo/Curator#nemo-curator-vs-alternatives): NeMo Curator vs. Apache Spark, HF datasets, DataTrove
- [Architecture Overview](https://github.com/NVIDIA-NeMo/Curator#architecture-overview): stage → Ray executor → RAPIDS backend diagram

## Performance Numbers

- Fuzzy deduplication 8 TB: 16× faster than CPU (7.5 h on 8× A100 vs 120 h on 256 CPU cores)
- Total cost of ownership: ~40% lower than CPU-only preprocessing workflows
- Multi-GPU scaling: near-linear (2.05 hrs → 0.50 hrs, 1 to 4 H100 80 GB nodes)
- Downstream LLM quality: up to 7% improvement from curated vs. uncurated data
- Nemotron-CC: Llama 3.1 8B trained on 1T NeMo-curated tokens scored +5.6 MMLU vs. DCLM baseline

## Architecture Summary

Pipeline stages (stateless, composable) → Ray Executor (local or multi-node) → RAPIDS backend (cuDF/cuML/cuGraph). Stages declare CPU vs. GPU resource requirements; Ray auto-schedules. Data flows as partitioned JSONL or Parquet shards; completed shards are checkpointed so pipelines safely restart after failure.

## Install Variants

| Extra | Use case |
|---|---|
| `text_cuda12` | Text curation, GPU, CUDA 12 (recommended) |
| `text_cuda11` | Text curation, GPU, CUDA 11 (legacy) |
| `text_cpu` | Text curation, CPU-only |
| `image` | Image curation |
| `video` | Video curation |
| `audio_cuda12` | Audio/ASR curation, GPU |
| `audio_cpu` | Audio/ASR curation, CPU |
| `sdg` | Synthetic data generation |
| `inference` | Inference integrations |

## Relation to NVIDIA NeMo Ecosystem

- **NeMo Curator** (`NVIDIA-NeMo/Curator`): this repo — data curation, preprocessing, deduplication
- **NeMo Framework** (`NVIDIA-NeMo/NeMo`): model training framework — trains on Curator-prepared data
- These are separate repositories and can be used independently.

## Optional

- [Nemotron-CC Technical Blog](https://developer.nvidia.com/blog/building-nemotron-cc-a-high-quality-trillion-token-dataset-for-llm-pretraining-from-common-crawl-using-nvidia-nemo-curator/): real-world case study, +5.6 MMLU improvement
- [Curating Trillion-Token Datasets blog](https://developer.nvidia.com/blog/curating-trillion-token-datasets-introducing-nemo-data-curator/): original NeMo Curator announcement
- [NVIDIA Developer NeMo Curator page](https://developer.nvidia.com/nemo-curator): product overview and enterprise context
- [NGC Container](https://catalog.ngc.nvidia.com/orgs/nvidia/containers/nemo-curator): pre-built Docker images with all dependencies
